# KneeBack

> Your ACL recovery companion. The habit-machine for the 9–12 month grind.

KneeBack is a mobile app that guides people through ACL rehabilitation with daily exercises, range-of-motion tracking, phase-based milestones, and peer community support. It is not a medical device and does not provide medical advice.

## Features

- **Daily Exercise Checklist**: Physio-prescribed exercises with built-in timers and rep counters
- **Phone-Based ROM Measurement**: Measure knee flexion and extension using the phone's accelerometer — no goniometer needed
- **Progress Calendar**: Visual streak tracking across the full recovery timeline
- **Phase Milestones**: Gate-based progression through Acute, Early Rehab, Strengthening, and Return to Sport phases
- **Community**: Anonymous peer support grouped by recovery phase; no leaderboards or comparison
- **Local-First Privacy**: All health data stored on-device; optional EU-hosted encrypted cloud sync; no data sold

## Privacy & Compliance

- GDPR compliant
- Local-first data storage by default
- No third-party data sharing
- EU-hosted cloud sync (optional)
- Not a medical device; not a substitute for professional physiotherapy guidance

## Pages

- [Landing page](/index.html): Product overview, features, CTA
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy.html): Full data practices and user rights
